original_image_tags: Page 4 of a typed launch data table. The document has three circular punch holes along the bottom edge. The text is typewritten in a monospaced font on a plain background.

elements.description: A typed table containing rows of data for launches numbered 58 through 76. The columns include LAUNCH SEQ, DATE, NICKNAME, OP #, FACILITY, VEHICLE TYPE, PROGRAM, CUM BY BOOSTER, COMMAND, and CUM BY COMMAND. Text entries include dates from 30 Sep 60 to 31 Jan 61, nicknames such as LEFT RUDDER, GIBSON GIRL, and JAYHAWK JAMBOREE, and vehicle types like THOR, ATLAS, and KIVA/HOPI. A footnote states '(*) Data not available' and the bottom right corner reads 'PAGE 4'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only a typed table with no photographs, sketches, or other visual elements, and describe identical table structure and content.
